fewShots.question: What is our overall denial rate?
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_claims, COUNT(CASE WHEN denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) as total_denials, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as denial_rate_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN denial_flag = 1 THEN billed_amount ELSE 0 END) as denied_dollars, SUM(billed_amount) as total_billed FROM fact_claim

fewShots.question: What is the denial rate by payer?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as total_claims, COUNT(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) as denied_claims, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as denial_rate_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN fc.billed_amount ELSE 0 END) as denied_dollars FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY denial_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: What are the top denial reasons and their financial impact?
fewShots.query: SELECT primary_denial_reason, COUNT(*) as denial_count, SUM(billed_amount) as total_billed_amount, AVG(billed_amount) as avg_claim_amount FROM fact_claim WHERE denial_flag = 1 GROUP BY primary_denial_reason ORDER BY denial_count DESC

fewShots.question: Compare the collection rate across all payers
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as total_claims, SUM(fc.billed_amount) as total_billed, SUM(fc.paid_amount) as total_paid, CAST(SUM(fc.paid_amount) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(fc.billed_amount), 0) * 100 as collection_rate_pct FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY collection_rate_pct ASC

fewShots.question: What is the total revenue at risk from high denial risk claims?
fewShots.query: SELECT denial_risk_category, COUNT(*) as claim_count, SUM(billed_amount) as revenue_at_risk, AVG(denial_risk_score) as avg_risk_score FROM fact_claim WHERE denial_risk_category = 'High' AND denial_flag = 0 GROUP BY denial_risk_category

fewShots.question: What is the appeal success rate by payer?
fewShots.query: SELECT payer_name, SUM(CASE WHEN appeal_outcome = 'Won' THEN appeal_count ELSE 0 END) as appeals_won, SUM(appeal_count) as total_appeals, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN appeal_outcome = 'Won' THEN appeal_count ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(appeal_count), 0) * 100 as success_rate_pct, SUM(total_amount_recovered) as total_recovered FROM agg_appeal_outcomes GROUP BY payer_name ORDER BY success_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: Which denial reasons are most worth appealing?
fewShots.query: SELECT denial_reason, SUM(CASE WHEN appeal_outcome = 'Won' THEN appeal_count ELSE 0 END) as appeals_won, SUM(appeal_count) as total_appeals, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN appeal_outcome = 'Won' THEN appeal_count ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(appeal_count), 0) * 100 as success_rate_pct, SUM(total_amount_recovered) as total_recovered, AVG(avg_amount_recovered) as avg_recovery_per_appeal FROM agg_appeal_outcomes GROUP BY denial_reason ORDER BY total_recovered DESC

fewShots.question: What are the average days in AR by payer?
fewShots.query: SELECT payer_name, SUM(claim_count) as total_claims, CAST(SUM(avg_days_to_payment * claim_count) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(claim_count), 0) as weighted_avg_days, CAST(SUM(median_days_to_payment * claim_count) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(claim_count), 0) as weighted_median_days, MAX(p90_days_to_payment) as max_p90_days, CAST(SUM(avg_net_collection_rate * claim_count) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(claim_count), 0) as weighted_net_collection_rate FROM agg_days_in_ar GROUP BY payer_name ORDER BY weighted_avg_days DESC

fewShots.question: Show me the days-in-AR trend over time
fewShots.query: SELECT dd.year, dd.month_number, dd.month_name, SUM(ar.claim_count) as total_claims, CAST(SUM(ar.avg_days_to_payment * ar.claim_count) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(ar.claim_count), 0) as weighted_avg_days, CAST(SUM(ar.avg_net_collection_rate * ar.claim_count) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(ar.claim_count), 0) as weighted_net_collection_rate FROM agg_days_in_ar ar JOIN dim_date dd ON ar.claim_date_key = dd.date_key GROUP BY dd.year, dd.month_number, dd.month_name ORDER BY dd.year, dd.month_number

fewShots.question: Show me the top 10 highest-value denied claims with patient and payer
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 10 fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, py.payer_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.primary_denial_reason, fc.recommended_action FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 ORDER BY fc.billed_amount DESC

fewShots.question: Show me claims with high denial risk that are still pending
fewShots.query: SELECT fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, py.payer_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.denial_risk_score, fc.recommended_action FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key WHERE fc.denial_risk_category = 'High' AND fc.claim_status = 'Pending' ORDER BY fc.denial_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: Compare prescription costs by payer — which payer pays the most?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as total_fills, SUM(fp.total_cost) as total_cost, SUM(fp.payer_paid) as payer_paid, SUM(fp.patient_copay) as patient_copay, CAST(SUM(fp.payer_paid) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(fp.total_cost), 0) * 100 as payer_coverage_pct, CAST(SUM(fp.patient_copay) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(fp.total_cost), 0) * 100 as patient_burden_pct FROM fact_prescription fp JOIN dim_payer py ON fp.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY patient_burden_pct DESC

fewShots.question: What is the average patient copay by payer and drug class?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, dm.drug_class, COUNT(*) as total_fills, AVG(fp.patient_copay) as avg_copay, AVG(fp.payer_paid) as avg_payer_paid, AVG(fp.total_cost) as avg_total_cost FROM fact_prescription fp JOIN dim_payer py ON fp.payer_key = py.payer_key JOIN dim_medication dm ON fp.medication_key = dm.medication_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, dm.drug_class ORDER BY py.payer_name, avg_copay DESC

fewShots.question: Which payers bear the highest cost burden for chronic medications?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as chronic_fills, SUM(fp.total_cost) as total_cost, SUM(fp.payer_paid) as payer_paid, SUM(fp.patient_copay) as patient_copay, AVG(fp.days_supply) as avg_days_supply FROM fact_prescription fp JOIN dim_payer py ON fp.payer_key = py.payer_key JOIN dim_medication dm ON fp.medication_key = dm.medication_key WHERE dm.is_chronic = 1 GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY payer_paid DESC

fewShots.question: What is our payer mix by claim volume and revenue?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, py.network_size, COUNT(*) as claim_count, SUM(fc.billed_amount) as total_billed, SUM(fc.paid_amount) as total_paid, CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_claim), 0) * 100 as pct_of_claims FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type, py.network_size ORDER BY claim_count DESC

fewShots.question: How many claims are pending vs paid vs denied this month?
fewShots.query: SELECT fc.claim_status, COUNT(*) as claim_count, SUM(fc.billed_amount) as total_billed, SUM(fc.paid_amount) as total_paid FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_date dd ON fc.claim_date_key = dd.date_key WHERE dd.year = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND dd.month_number = MONTH(GETDATE()) GROUP BY fc.claim_status ORDER BY claim_count DESC

fewShots.question: Show me all denied claims over $50,000
fewShots.query: SELECT fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, py.payer_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.paid_amount, fc.primary_denial_reason, fc.claim_status FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 AND fc.billed_amount > 50000 ORDER BY fc.billed_amount DESC

fewShots.question: Which payers have the highest readmission rates?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as total_encounters, SUM(fe.readmission_flag) as readmissions, CAST(SUM(fe.readmission_flag) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as readmission_rate_pct, AVG(fe.readmission_risk_score) as avg_risk_score FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN fact_claim fc ON fe.encounter_key = fc.encounter_key JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY readmission_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: How does SDOH risk affect denial rates?
fewShots.query: SELECT s.risk_tier as sdoh_risk_tier, COUNT(*) as total_claims, COUNT(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) as denied_claims, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as denial_rate_pct, SUM(fc.billed_amount) as total_billed FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_sdoh s ON dp.zip_code = s.zip_code GROUP BY s.risk_tier ORDER BY denial_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: Show me which providers prescribe the most to each payer
fewShots.query: SELECT dpr.display_name as provider, dpr.specialty, py.payer_name, COUNT(*) as total_fills, SUM(fp.total_cost) as total_cost, SUM(fp.payer_paid) as payer_paid FROM fact_prescription fp JOIN dim_provider dpr ON fp.provider_key = dpr.provider_key AND dpr.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fp.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY dpr.display_name, dpr.specialty, py.payer_name ORDER BY total_cost DESC

fewShots.question: Show me denied claims with their primary diagnosis
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 20 fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dd_diag.icd_code, dd_diag.icd_description, py.payer_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.primary_denial_reason FROM fact_claim fc JOIN fact_encounter fe ON fc.encounter_key = fe.encounter_key JOIN fact_diagnosis fd ON fe.encounter_key = fd.encounter_key AND fd.diagnosis_type = 'principal' JOIN dim_diagnosis dd_diag ON fd.diagnosis_key = dd_diag.diagnosis_key JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 ORDER BY fc.billed_amount DESC

fewShots.question: Show me appeal outcomes by payer and denial reason
fewShots.query: SELECT payer_name, denial_reason, appeal_outcome, SUM(appeal_count) as total_appeals, SUM(total_amount_recovered) as total_recovered FROM agg_appeal_outcomes GROUP BY payer_name, denial_reason, appeal_outcome ORDER BY payer_name, denial_reason, appeal_outcome

fewShots.question: Show me the net collection rate trend by payer over time
fewShots.query: SELECT dd.year, dd.month_number, dd.month_name, ar.payer_name, SUM(ar.claim_count) as total_claims, CAST(SUM(ar.avg_net_collection_rate * ar.claim_count) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(ar.claim_count), 0) as weighted_net_collection_rate FROM agg_days_in_ar ar JOIN dim_date dd ON ar.claim_date_key = dd.date_key GROUP BY dd.year, dd.month_number, dd.month_name, ar.payer_name ORDER BY dd.year, dd.month_number, ar.payer_name

fewShots.question: What is the PMPM cost by encounter type?
fewShots.query: SELECT fe.encounter_type, SUM(fe.total_charges) as total_charges, COUNT(DISTINCT fe.patient_key) as unique_members, COUNT(DISTINCT dd.month_number) as months, CAST(SUM(fe.total_charges) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fe.patient_key) * COUNT(DISTINCT dd.month_number), 0) as pmpm FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_date dd ON fe.encounter_date_key = dd.date_key GROUP BY fe.encounter_type ORDER BY pmpm DESC

fewShots.question: Compare payer reimbursement rates
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, py.avg_reimbursement_pct, py.network_size, COUNT(fc.claim_key) as total_claims, SUM(fc.billed_amount) as total_billed, SUM(fc.paid_amount) as total_paid, CAST(SUM(fc.paid_amount) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(fc.billed_amount), 0) * 100 as actual_reimbursement_pct FROM dim_payer py LEFT JOIN fact_claim fc ON py.payer_key = fc.payer_key WHERE py.is_active = 1 GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type, py.avg_reimbursement_pct, py.network_size ORDER BY actual_reimbursement_pct DESC
